scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.db:seed: curl -sf -X POST http://localhost:${PORT:-5000}/api/seed/full -H "x-admin-seed-key: ${DEV_SEED_KEY:-local-dev-seed-ajkmart}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' | node -e "process.stdin.resume(); let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const r=JSON.parse(d);console.log(JSON.stringify(r,null,2));}catch{console.log(d);}});"
